title: Born to Run: A Hidden Tribe, Superathletes, and the Greatest Race the World Has Never Seen
description: An exploration of the hidden tribe of Tarahumara Indians in Mexico's Copper Canyons, who run ultramarathon distances with seemingly effortless grace and without injury, challenging everything modern science thought it knew about running.
rationale: Root book #1 for the empty exercise science and physical training subcategory. Born to Run fundamentally challenged conventional wisdom about running form, shoes, and injury prevention, making it a cornerstone text for understanding human endurance performance.
